---
title: "All Projects"
listing:
  contents: posts
  sort: "date desc"
  type: default
  categories: true
  sort-ui: false
  filter-ui: false
page-layout: full
title-block-banner: true
---

### I Swear, You're Not Stupid...
:::: columns

::: {.column width="55%"}
This is a repository of 
[code, analysis, visualization, plotly]
:::

::: {.column width="5%"}
:::

::: {.column width="40%"}
Image 1
:::

::::

## Creative Coding
:::: columns

::: {.column width="40%"}
Image 2
:::

::: {.column width="5%"}
:::

::: {.column width="55%"}
Description 2
[code, analysis, visualization, plotly]
:::

::::
